metadata.description: Structured eval scenarios derived from real eval trace runs. Each scenario captures actual model behavior observed during eval harness execution.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_turn_on_kitchen_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Turn on the kitchen light
scenarios.notes: Model calls correct tool (ControlLights) but light stays off. Eval also flags tool name mismatch (ControlLights vs ControlLightsAsync) which is an eval infra bug.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_turn_off_bedroom_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Turn off the bedroom lights
scenarios.notes: granite4 calls GetLightsState (query) instead of ControlLights (action). Consistent across all 8 eval runs for turn-off commands.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_dim_living_room_20260325_152116
scenarios.prompt: Dim the living room lights to 30 percent
scenarios.notes: Model calls correct tool but brightness value may not be passed correctly. Earlier run (20260325_131333) shows model responding 'I can't dim the living room lights' instead.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_dim_living_room_20260325_131333
scenarios.prompt: Dim the living room lights to 30 percent
scenarios.notes: Model says 'I'm sorry, but I can't dim the living room lights. Could you please specify a different setting?' despite having the tool available. Hallucinated inability.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_set_blue_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Set the office light to blue
scenarios.notes: Zero tool calls emitted. Pain map confirms color parameter extraction is 100% broken — when model does call, it puts color name in state field instead of color field.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_query_state_on_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Is the kitchen light on or off?
scenarios.notes: Model calls correct tool. Marked as failed in eval only due to Async suffix mismatch (eval infra bug). Functionally correct behavior.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_query_state_off_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Is the kitchen light on?
scenarios.notes: Model calls correct tool but reports 'The kitchen lights are turned on' when the light is actually off. Hallucinated state — ignores tool return value.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_list_garage_20260325
scenarios.prompt: What lights are in the garage?
scenarios.notes: Functionally correct — calls GetLightsState for garage. Eval score is 0 only due to Async suffix mismatch in eval harness.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_stt_fuzzy_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Dimm the kichen lite to fifdy percent
scenarios.notes: Model handles STT spelling errors and calls correct tool, but brightness parameter extraction fails on misspelled 'fifdy percent'.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_out_of_domain_weather_20260325
scenarios.prompt: What's the weather like today?
scenarios.notes: Correctly rejects out-of-domain request with no tool calls. Consistent pass across all 8 eval runs.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_out_of_domain_thermostat_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Set the thermostat to 72 degrees
scenarios.notes: Correctly redirects climate request. Consistent pass across all 8 eval runs.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_turn_on_already_on_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Turn on the kitchen light
scenarios.notes: When light is already on, granite4 queries state instead of issuing control command. Model second-guesses the user's intent.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_turn_on_kitchen_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Turn on the kitchen light
scenarios.notes: gemma3:270m emits zero tool calls and empty response. Model too small for tool-calling schema. Consistent across all 11 non-OOD scenarios.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_turn_off_bedroom_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Turn off the bedroom lights
scenarios.notes: Empty response, zero tool calls. gemma3:270m does not produce function calls.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_dim_living_room_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Dim the living room lights to 30 percent
scenarios.notes: Empty response. gemma3:270m cannot handle brightness parameters.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_set_blue_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Set the office light to blue
scenarios.notes: Empty response. Color commands completely unsupported at this model size.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_query_state_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Is the kitchen light on or off?
scenarios.notes: Cannot even query state. All tool-calling scenarios fail on gemma3:270m.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_stt_fuzzy_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Dimm the kichen lite to fifdy percent
scenarios.notes: Empty response on STT-degraded input.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_out_of_domain_weather_20260325
scenarios.prompt: What's the weather like today?
scenarios.notes: Passes by default — no tool calls expected and none produced. Does not validate that OOD handling is deliberate.

scenarios.name: trace_gemma3_out_of_domain_thermostat_20260325
scenarios.prompt: Set the thermostat to 72 degrees
scenarios.notes: Same as weather — passes because no tools expected. gemma3:270m produces no tool calls at all.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_turn_on_kitchen_20260321_early
scenarios.prompt: Turn on the kitchen light
scenarios.notes: Early run with 8 scenarios. Same wrong-tool pattern as later runs — granite4 consistently queries state instead of controlling. Score was higher overall (67%) because fewer scenarios existed.

scenarios.name: trace_granite4_set_blue_20260321_color_in_state
scenarios.prompt: Set the office light to blue
scenarios.notes: granite4 puts 'blue' in the state field instead of the color field. 100% reproducible across all runs where a tool call is emitted. Root cause: ControlLights has state as required param, color as optional — SLMs conflate them.
